mapper.select: SELECT admin_id AS employeeId, NULL AS storeId, TRIM(login_id) AS loginId, password AS password, name AS name, TRIM(role) AS role, TRIM(status) AS status FROM headquarter_admins WHERE TRIM(login_id) = TRIM(#{loginId}) LIMIT 1

SELECT admin_id AS employeeId, NULL AS storeId, TRIM(login_id) AS loginId, password AS password, name AS name, TRIM(role) AS role, TRIM(status) AS status FROM headquarter_admins WHERE admin_id = #{employeeId} LIMIT 1
